title: palicourea quadrilateralis
intro: Palicourea quadrilateralis, also known as the 'Coral Honeysuckle', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea quadrilateralis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
